title: Beyond Failing
subTitle: A young student struggles with academic pressure due to poor performance. However, she sets out on a path of self-discovery and soon finds her true passion.

title: Bridge
subTitle: Widower Mukesh lives with son Rahul, 28. Rahul finds his father's behavior odd and Mukesh resents his son's constant judgment of his choices.

subTitle: Chand Saanse

subTitle: Countless

subTitle: Blowback

subTitle: Betu

title: The Visit
subTitle: The Visit

title: Chashmadeed
subTitle: An ageing mother, living with her entitled son and his wife, finds her sight blurring and clearing like a malfunctioning camera lens one morning. Soon, a visit to a nearby eye clinic, strongly suggested by her young neighbour, leads to unexpected revelations.

title: Bita Hua Pal
subTitle: The journey of a woman named Mira, who, like many others, finds herself questioning the foundation of her relationship. As she navigates the ups and downs of her own love story, she reflects on the nature of love and the challenges of maintaining a lasting connection.

title: Best Friend
subTitle: A misunderstanding about his lover and friend propels Manav into a violent rage.

title: Black Coffee
subTitle: A woman faces sexual harassment at the hands of her boss. Later, she decides to teach him a lesson with the help of her colleague.

title: Bridge
subTitle: Widower Mukesh lives with son Rahul, 28. Rahul finds his father's behavior odd and Mukesh resents his son's constant judgment of his choices.

title: Aflatoon
subTitle: Two siblings dwelling in a distant land who yearn to transmit a sugary delicacy to their ailing patriarch. These brothers diligently arrange the dispatch of a confection to comfort their father during his recovery.

title: Ansh: The Deadly Part
subTitle: An honest police officer dedicated to uprooting crime ruffles the feathers of corrupt politicians and criminals, who scheme to stop him.

title: Akhiri Parchi
subTitle: Akhiri Parchi

title: Abba Ki Chaddi
subTitle: A troubled housewife, weary and worn down by her husband's numerous past misdeeds, finally seeks the retribution she believes is long overdue.

title: Baggage
subTitle: Sara's twin sister disappears in a bizarre manner, leaving her to deal with the loss. However, when she is unable to come to terms with it, Sara decides to find answers.

title: Barat
subTitle: Barat

title: Antahkaran
subTitle: A devout Hindu's quest for vengeance is complicated by his two friends with conflicting ideologies, both of whom attempt to manipulate his actions.

title: A Notice
subTitle: A Notice

title: A Tale Of An Onion Witch Chapter 2
subTitle: A newlywed couple encounters a woman claiming to be Mangla, who cautions them about an ancient witch roaming the area at night in search of onions. However, the situation takes an unexpected turn when a young girl desperately seeks assistance by knocking on their door at the stroke of midnight, plunging the couple into a potentially perilous scenario.

title: Adhure Poore Se Hum
subTitle: Two college time friends embark on a long drive on a Sunday morning, leaving their bustling city lives behind. As they amble through the hilly roads, they reveal to each other, their old longings and hidden pasts. Their rose-tinted nostalgia is broken, and they come face to face with their imperfect lives.

title: Aam Ka Achaar
subTitle: Haunted by the riots that took his parents 20 years ago, Karan confronts the man who once loved him as a son-yet betrayed him in the worst way. Torn between revenge and forgiveness, he seeks meaning in the madness. A powerful story of loss, betrayal, and the fight for redemption.

title: Be Khush
subTitle: Be Khush

title: An Astrologer's Day
subTitle: An Astrologer's Day

title: 10.30 Lets Go To School
subTitle: A determined village girl struggles to attend school as her family expects her to stay home, but her love for learning drives her to find clever ways to keep studying.

title: Ahsaas
subTitle: After being rejected by their fathers, Raju and Anu elope and get settled in a village but when the parents learn about their whereabouts, they decide to bring them back.

title: Arundeep Singh
subTitle: A man grapples with a speech disorder that affects his daily life. Despite this, he decides to face his greatest fear and attempts to date a woman.

title: Family
subTitle: Karthik's parents' divorce sparks worry in Anvith about his own family. Trying to keep the peace at home, Anvith's efforts backfire, leading to a proper barney between his mother and father.

title: Bahar Aa Chaman Prakash
subTitle: Bahar Aa Chaman Prakash delves into the story of a man reluctant to marry his lifelong acquaintance. Shutting himself away and avoiding his father, he faces the girl his father wishes him to wed. When she joins him and locks themselves in a room, they emerge with a revelation connected to the man's inner struggles. Will his father embrace this truth?

title: Alvida
subTitle: A heartbroken man sits alone in a bar, haunted by the end of a relationship, and confronts the agonising necessity of saying a final goodbye.

title: ABC
subTitle: Whilst managing her fledgling venture, Shruthi confronts feelings of solitude as she traverses the complexities of daily existence, striving to find her place in a bustling world.

title: Agarbatti
subTitle: Agarbatti

title: Live A Little
subTitle: Live A Little

title: A Tale Of An Onion Witch
subTitle: Two flatmates hear about a witch who wanders around and asks for onions. However, they become shocked when the witch turns out to be an attractive woman instead.

title: Aplam Chaplam
subTitle: Aplam Chaplam

title: Aakhri Kahani
subTitle: A desperate writer plans one final movie pitch to a producer. However, he ends up driving the producer in his taxi, giving him an unexpected opportunity to share his idea during the ride.

subTitle: Ban Chor

subTitle: Ae Ajnabi

title: A Situation
subTitle: A Situation

title: Adarniya Mantri Ji
subTitle: Finance Minister and her secretary seize black money, yet half goes missing. Later, the secretary reveals he's behind the theft as part of a secret plan. The story ends unresolved.

title: Baalak
subTitle: A film about a girl moving to Kolkata for her new job. She chooses a hotel for overnight stay where an incident makes her realize that life revolves in a circle and carries her emotionally very close to her home and family.

title: Aakhri Sawari
subTitle: Aakhri Sawari

title: Avasthana
subTitle: A family struggles to manage their daily expenses following the death of the patriarch. Desperate, the youngest son steals a chicken despite the family's vegetarian beliefs.

title: 23 B Raheja
subTitle: 23B Raheja is a gripping one-night drama that peels back the glossy layers of the entertainment industry to expose the shadows lurking beneath. The story revolves around a celebrated casting director whose charm masks a long trail of manipulation and exploitation. His power begins to crumble when a young woman arrives at his door, posing as an aspiring actress but with a haunting connection to his past. As the night unfolds, so does a tense game of revelations.

title: Bahaar
subTitle: A young woman gets married, with the typical expectations of a blissful domestic life. However, her dreams turn into a nightmare when her mother-in-law constantly harasses and humiliates her solely because she has been unable to conceive after five years of marriage.

title: 2 Square
subTitle: 2 Square

title: Ruk Jana Nahi
subTitle: A withdrawn young man living with his father begins to regain purpose when a wedding next door brings people noise and quiet moments of unexpected hope.

title: Anu Aur Di
subTitle: After a heated breakup, an angry girl calls her older sister for a late-night pickup. However, they soon get into a fight and are pulled over by the police.

subTitle: A cab driver's quiet routine is shattered when she picks up an apparently innocuous passenger carrying a red suitcase. What starts off as a simple ride soon turns into a twisted journey.

subTitle: A mother loves her child dearly, which gives the latter the strength and courage to overcome various obstacles and face fears.

subTitle: In a small town near Delhi, two young boys from contrasting socioeconomic backgrounds happen to have a fateful encounter.

subTitle: Chitra, a method actor known for her ability to deliver realistic performances, starts preparing for her next role. However, things take a dark turn when the intensity of her character and her desire to excel in her work cause her to lose touch with reality.

subTitle: Rahul and Priya meet during a trip to Goa and fall in love with each other. However, their lives take a turn when Rahul learns that Priya is the sibling of Shiva, who had once tortured his sister.

She expresses her concerns to the producer, but he reacts angrily and uses harsh language toward her. Will the actress decide to find a way to work together or stand up for herself?

title: Humraz
subTitle: This is the story of a couple who tried to raise their voice against the undesirable practice of one community. Hamraz is a witness to the hero playing Ravanahatha and the incidents that happened to him... Sometimes the image that looks white is also black... Hamraz is a story full of mysteries... The curtain will soon fall on all the secrets and the real story will come out in front of everyone.
